sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52789" key="kaloago/rastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλοᾰγόραστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n52789.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">well-bought, cheap</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
